Santorini Saturdays Brunch at OIA Dubai 🇬🇷 🇦🇪 

@oia.dxb brings Santorini vibes to Dubai every Saturday, with ocean views, live entertainment, dancers and Aegean-inspired flavours.

Every Saturday | 5 PM – 8 PM
📍 OIA Dubai, JA Ocean View Hotel
💸 From AED 249 per person
